method: CLV% = entry_odds / closing_odds - 1. Positive value means BETPREDICT captured a better price than the closing market.

9847|under35|UNDER 3.50.away_team: Real Club Deportivo de la Coruña

9844|over15|OVER 1.50.home_team: Real Club Deportivo de la Coruña

diagnosis.label: CLV reliable
diagnosis.short: sample suficient pentru market beat rate
diagnosis.interpretation: Nu crește miza doar pe ROI; urmărește Market Beat Rate/CLV+ pe minimum 20 de linii.
